title: Tiny Totem
description: Makes the Totem of Undying smaller and keeps the default 16x16 texture. Works with other 16x Texture Packs
body:
The Tiny Totem Texture Pack makes the Totem of Undying Item Model smaller.
---
A simple scaled down 3D Model of the Totem of Undying is used to make the Totem small, without losing the original 16x16 Texture of the Totem of Undying. You can edit the scale values in the .json file to set it to the size you like. This Texture Pack does not include a Texture so it can work with other Texture Packs.
